title: Two-Room Flat in Barriera di Milano
address: Via Giovanni Paisiello 38, Barriera di Milano, Turin
description: In the area between Piazza Respighi and Piazza Bottesini, in a completely renovated building, we offer a two-room apartment for rent on the fourth floor comprising an entrance hall, bedroom, eat-in kitchen, bathroom with tub, and balcony/cellar. The apartment is fully furnished, has an electric boiler, and the bedroom includes a double bed. A 4+4-year contract totals €6,000/year. References required!

title: Casa Doria - Exclusive Two-Room Flat with Terrace
address: Via Doria 7 (corner of Via Lagrange), Centro, Turin
features: Air Conditioning, Alarm, Security Door, Video Entryphone, 16 sqm terrace overlooking courtyard
description: CASA DORIA - CLASS IN THE CENTER OF TURIN. Apartment 2.2. We offer for rent an exclusive, newly renovated, 49 sq m two-room apartment on the second floor of the new Casadoria residential complex, the result of an excellent renovation that combines Turin's tradition with contemporary architecture. The property comprises an entrance hall, a large living room with an open kitchen, a bedroom, and a bathroom. The apartment also features a large 16 sq m terrace overlooking the courtyard. Located almost on the corner of the exclusive Via Lagrange, a major thoroughfare for luxury shopping.

title: Furnished Flat with Double Exposure
address: Via Giovanni Francesco Napione 33, Vanchiglia, Turin
description: Via Napione. Furnished two-room apartment, double exposure. The apartment is located just steps from Piazza Vittorio, in a strategic location convenient to amenities. Located in a well-maintained 1960s building, measuring approximately 60 square meters. The property comprises a large entrance hall, storage room, bedroom, bathroom with window, and living room with kitchenette. Enhanced by two large balconies. Features state-of-the-art thermal break windows for excellent insulation, excellent electrical system, and restored original floors, including parquet.

title: Renovated Two-Room Flat with Outdoor Space
address: Via Pollenzo 14, San Paolo / Cenisia, Turin
description: CENISIA/SAN PAOLO - Propose a fully renovated and finely furnished apartment, ideal for those seeking comfort, functionality, and a strategic location. The property consists of a bright living room with an open kitchen, a bedroom, a modern bathroom, and enjoys a valuable exclusive outdoor space, perfect for moments of relaxation outdoors. The heating is autonomous via a heat pump, ensuring efficient management of consumption. Strategically connected to public transport, close to the Polytechnic of Turin.

title: High-Floor Flat Near Polytechnic
address: Corso Rosselli Carlo e Nello 105, Santa Rita, Turin
description: Furnished apartment for rent on Corso Rosselli, conveniently located near the Polytechnic University of Turin. The apartment is located on the sixth floor of an elegant building with concierge service. Comprises an entrance hall leading to a living area with kitchen and a balcony overlooking the veranda, a bedroom with two beds (with the option of single occupancy by renting the entire apartment), a livable balcony, a convenient storage room, and a bathroom. Ready to move in. Excellent option for students.
